title: Rain Temple
body:
# Rain Temple [1.21.8]

This data pack adds a new build-able structure (Cannot be found in the wild!), that allows you to control the weather!

Simply use a **copper ingot**, and change the weather state to **rain**, **clear** and even **thunder**!

### Here's a video showcasing how to use the datapack, and how to build the Rain Temple:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/4vv7DCMIHPw?si=HuBsnQUFV1kg4VOd" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
